title: Anthropic's Claude Tag: 60% Interact This Way! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses Claude Tag, an Anthropic feature reportedly used in 60% of internal interactions. The video explores how Claude Tag works and its role in Anthropic's operations.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof covers Claude Tag, an Anthropic feature that the video reports is used in 60% of internal interactions. It explains how Claude Tag functions and the role it plays in Anthropic's operations, framed around prompt engineering. The takeaway is a look at an internal usage pattern at Anthropic and how the feature shapes the way interactions with Claude are structured.
